title: truellum senticosum
intro: Truellum senticosum, also known as the stickleaf or tick trefoil, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Truellum senticosum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used in herbal remedies, such as salves and poultices.
